title: Pit Landing
description: A cramped landing bolts the Pit to the rest of the colony. The bulkhead wheezes with every pressure shift, and warm amber lights make the scuffed metal glow like old lunch trays.

actions.name: bulkhead
actions.condition_unmet_message: Standard Dominion seal. It won't open until the shift-change siren sounds.

title: Mess Hall
description: Bolted tables, dented trays, and crooked amber lights turn dinner into another shift. Miners trade jokes under their breath while a cracked Dominion monitor chirps about gratitude.

actions.name: tables
actions.condition_unmet_message: Bolted to the floor and scarred by a thousand metal spoons.

actions.name: monitor
actions.condition_unmet_message: 'YOUR SHIFT IS YOUR CONTRIBUTION.' The screen is spider-webbed with cracks.

title: Ration Sink
description: A greasy alcove coughs up daily rations from a dispenser patched with tape and hope. A dented pot bubbles on the warmer, smelling almost like beef if you stand far enough away.

actions.name: dispenser
actions.condition_unmet_message: It dispenses 400 calories of 'Colony Blend' with a wet thud.

actions.name: pot
actions.condition_unmet_message: The stew is thick enough to hold a spoon upright. Best not to look too closely.

title: Lift Shaft
description: A rusted ladder and narrow lift cage climb through the Pit's stacked levels. A sweating pipe vents steam around the rails, turning the hazard stripes glossy and slick.

actions.name: ladder
actions.condition_unmet_message: Rusted and slick with condensation. Watch your step.

actions.name: pipe
actions.condition_unmet_message: The steam is hot and smells like old copper.

title: Weather Lab
description: A debug-only lighting and effects room for checking environmental overlays against a real exploration background.

title: Jed's Bunk
description: Jed's pod is bigger than yours only because he filled every spare inch with parts. Manuals, gadgets, and half-built fixes crowd the bunk, all smelling like machine oil and stubbornness.

actions.name: manuals
actions.condition_unmet_message: 'Advanced Hydraulics' and 'Ship Engine Maintenance'. They are well-thumbed.

actions.name: gadgets
actions.condition_unmet_message: Small sensors, battery packs, and modified cutters. Jed's retirement hobby is a full-time job.

title: Pod Row
description: Sleeping pods stack up the walls like drawers for tired people. Old posters curl beside loose cables, personal charms, and the low buzz of distant drills.

actions.name: sleeping pods
actions.condition_unmet_message: The stacked pods look more like filing cabinets for people.

actions.name: posters
actions.condition_unmet_message: The faces of the 'Founders' are faded and covered in grease stains.

title: Nova's Bunk
description: Your bunk is a narrow shelf in the colony wall, barely wide enough to dream sideways. The bunk light buzzes above cargo netting that holds your tools, your spare ration, and the little pieces of yourself Dominion has not inventoried yet.
description_dark: The room is dead black except for the emergency glow around your bunk light.

description_variants.description: The bunk light steadies into a cheap yellow halo. Your bunk is still hard and narrow, the netting still sags with tools and rations, but now the door seam is visible enough to leave without cracking your shin.
The bunk light buzzes awake, sketching the room back into shape: your narrow bunk, the cargo netting, the scratched floor, and the door out to the sleeping level.

west.message_locked: You can't pick a safe path through the bunkroom until the light is on.
west.message_unlock: The bunkroom light steadies, and the way out is clear.

actions.name: bunk light
actions.condition_unmet_message: The wall switch is cold under your fingers.

actions.name: bunk
actions.condition_unmet_message: It's hard, it's small, but it's yours.

actions.name: netting
actions.condition_unmet_message: A few tools, a spare ration, and a small metal carving Jed gave you.

title: Supply Closet
description: Supplies crowd the closet in cracked bins, with filter units stacked beside drums of industrial soap. Behind them, your little scrap pile waits in the flicker of a bulb that sounds ready to quit.

actions.name: supplies
actions.condition_unmet_message: Barrels of industrial soap and crates of synthetic sponges.

actions.name: filter units
actions.condition_unmet_message: Clogged with fine orange dust. The air in the Pit is only getting worse.

actions.name: bulb
actions.condition_unmet_message: It buzzes at a frequency that makes your skin crawl.

title: Vent Crawl
description: A low maintenance crawl runs warm and stale beneath the Pit. Through the grates, the mess hall becomes a tinny rhythm of spoons, gossip, and someone laughing when they should not.

actions.name: mess hall
actions.condition_unmet_message: The voices of your coworkers echo up through the ducts.

actions.name: grates
actions.condition_unmet_message: Bolted shut, but the gaps are wide enough to peer through.

title: Shared Showers
description: Lukewarm water spits from dented shower heads and turns orange dust into lazy streaks across the tiles. The broken soap dispenser rattles with every vent cycle, as if offended by the idea of cleanliness.

actions.name: tiles
actions.condition_unmet_message: Once white, now a permanent shade of 'Colony Rust'.

actions.name: soap dispenser
actions.condition_unmet_message: Empty. Dominion considers soap a luxury this month.

title: Scrap Yard
description: Rusted scrap, busted loaders, and retired drone shells pile up around Jed's shutter. It looks like junk until you know which pieces he has been saving for you.

actions.name: scrap
actions.condition_unmet_message: Twisted girders and hulls from a dozen different ship classes. Jed never throws anything away.

actions.name: shutter
actions.condition_unmet_message: The motor is old and loud, but it keeps the Dominion inspectors out.

title: Main Bench
description: Warm work lights spill across Jed's workbench, catching on solder smoke and bright little tool handles. Your illegal mining cutter sits in the middle of it all, dangerous, necessary, and almost ready.

actions.name: workbench
actions.condition_unmet_message: Jed's workbench is ready. Repair the Cryo-Inductor into a Functional Cryo-Inductor before shift clearance.

actions.name: mining cutter
actions.condition_unmet_message: Your jury-rigged tool. It's built to cut rock, but it's currently held together by luck and Jed's patience.

title: Jed's Office
description: Ancient screens, hand-drawn schematics, and locked parts bins crowd Jed's windowless office. His worn chair still holds the shape of someone who keeps choosing one more repair over sleep.

actions.name: screens
actions.condition_unmet_message: Flickering CRTs displaying local sensor feeds and shipment manifests.

actions.name: schematics
actions.condition_unmet_message: Jed's own hand-drawn plans for engine modifications. They're more art than engineering.

actions.name: chair
actions.condition_unmet_message: Smells like machine oil and Jed's cheap tobacco.

title: Parts Loft
description: The loft hangs above the workshop floor on beams that complain about every step. Jed keeps the good parts up here, wrapped in cloth and labeled with a code only he pretends is obvious.

actions.name: parts
actions.condition_unmet_message: Servo motors, optic sensors, and rare earth magnets tucked into organized crates.

actions.name: workshop floor
actions.condition_unmet_message: You can see Jed working below, his wrench moving in a steady, practiced rhythm.

title: Tool Shed
description: Every set of tools has a hook, a shine, and probably a story about how Jed stole it back from Dominion twice. The heavy toolbox on the low shelf looks older than most of the colony.

actions.name: tools
actions.condition_unmet_message: Wrenches, soldering irons, and pry-bars. All kept in better condition than Jed himself.

actions.name: toolbox
actions.condition_unmet_message: A heavy steel box. It's locked tight.

title: Flooded Basement
description: Water glimmers around a scrap pile below the shop, reflecting conduit light in wobbly stripes. The air smells like wet stone, hot wire, and secrets Jed has not admitted are secrets.

actions.name: scrap pile
actions.condition_unmet_message: You dig through the pile and find a useful piece of alloy.

actions.name: conduit
actions.condition_unmet_message: It's leaking a foul-smelling coolant. Jed really needs to fix this.

title: Loading Dock
description: A cargo rail vanishes into the dark beyond the shutter. A battered loader waits beside a fresh scrap pile, while a scarred riot shield trainer makes the whole dock feel like a lesson waiting to happen.

actions.name: cargo rail
actions.condition_unmet_message: The loader shoves the cargo along the rail, clearing enough space for the trapped workers to breathe.

actions.name: loader
actions.condition_unmet_message: The loader coughs awake with enough hydraulic force to move a wall.

actions.name: scrap
actions.condition_unmet_message: A fresh delivery of salvaged engine parts, still warm from use.

title: Back Alley
description: A narrow service exit slips from Jed's shop toward Trade Row. Grease, dust, and a rusted dolly crowd the wall, making the alley feel like a shortcut the colony forgot to tax.

actions.name: dolly
actions.condition_unmet_message: It's seen better days. The frame is bent and the handle is missing.

title: Triage Hall
description: Grimy benches line the hall under flickering clinical lights. A tired bio-scanner blinks near Doc's door while a chemical haze seeps from the vent access to the east.

actions.name: lights
actions.condition_unmet_message: They buzz and flicker, casting long, sickly shadows across the hall.

actions.name: bio-scanner
actions.condition_unmet_message: An older model, struggling to process the sheer volume of cases.

title: Doc's Exam Room
description: Doc's exam room tries hard to look clean and loses by inches. A glitching monitor, taped scanner leads, and overused med trays turn every injury into paperwork with a pulse.

actions.name: monitor
actions.condition_unmet_message: The display is covered in status errors. Dominion's latest update seems to have broken the diagnostic tools.

title: Med Supply Closet
description: Supplies sit in thin, careful rows: expired packets, rationed bandages, and disinfectant bottles already half-empty. One locked cold cabinet still hums like it is guarding treasure.

actions.name: supplies
actions.condition_unmet_message: Crates of outdated bandages and half-empty canisters of disinfectant.

actions.name: cabinet
actions.condition_unmet_message: Locked. You can see the faint glow of temperature-sensitive vaccines inside.

title: Ventilation Hub
description: Rusted fans and patched pipes keep the med-bay breathing by sheer habit. A cracked vent hisses chemical haze into the room, and a toxic blockage swells in the updraft while a skimmer circles overhead.

description_variants.description: The fans settle into a cleaner rhythm, and the cracked vent only ticks as it cools. The toxic blockage is gone; patched pipes still complain, but the med-bay can finally breathe.
The fans grind in reverse, pulling green haze away from the cracked vent and bunching it around the toxic blockage. Patched pipes shudder as the system tries to remember how clean air works.
The cracked vent leaks because pressure is trapped behind the fans. Patched pipes hammer in the walls, and the toxic blockage swells each time the airflow stutters.

actions.name: pipes
actions.condition_unmet_message: The metal is hot to the touch and vibrating with the force of the pumps.

actions.name: fans
actions.condition_unmet_message: The fans cough and stutter, shoving pressure through the wrong part of the vent line.

actions.name: vent
actions.condition_unmet_message: The cracked vent is leaking poison because pressure is backed up behind the fans.

actions.name: toxic blockage
actions.condition_unmet_message: The toxic blockage pulses in the redirected updraft, close enough to clear if the airflow is stable.

title: Exhaust Mouth
description: The vent pipe opens wide to the canyon, framing the orange mining pit far below. Wind claws through the grate, carrying dust, cold metal, and the faint roar of machines that never clock out.

actions.name: vent pipe
actions.condition_unmet_message: The scale of the mining operation is breathtaking... and terrifying.

actions.name: grate
actions.condition_unmet_message: Bolted firmly into the canyon wall. No way out through here.

title: Decon Lock
description: This cramped airlock is built to blast mining suits, not people. The nozzles drip sterilant that smells like burnt lemons and bad decisions.

actions.name: nozzles
actions.condition_unmet_message: Ready to spray. Just don't breathe while the sterilant is active.

actions.name: sterilant
actions.condition_unmet_message: A chemical that can strip the paint off a ship and the skin off a miner.

title: The Morgue
description: Low ceilings press down over rows of cold metal drawers. Dominion calls the names inside closed accounts; Doc keeps a little lamp burning anyway.

actions.name: drawers
actions.condition_unmet_message: Cold, clinical, and numbered. No names down here.

title: Trade Row Gate
description: A crooked archway and a stack of flickering signs mark the start of Trade Row, buzzing bright against the carved rock. Beyond them, voices, power cells, and sizzling food all compete to sell you something.

actions.name: signs
actions.condition_unmet_message: They advertise everything from black-market rations to illegal engine mods.

actions.name: archway
actions.condition_unmet_message: Bolted directly into the canyon wall, it marks the boundary of the 'official' colony.

title: Market Strip
description: Makeshift stalls crowd the corridor with patched tarps, power cells, and noodles fried in questionable oil. Scrapper's stall sits north behind a curtain of hanging cables, and a scanner-dead corner waits to the east.

actions.name: stalls
actions.condition_unmet_message: A chaotic collection of tents and crates where anything can be bought for the right price.

actions.name: power cells
actions.condition_unmet_message: Standard issue cells with the Dominion logos scratched off.

title: Scrapper's Stall
description: Illegal tech, salvaged weapons, and a locked datapad spill from Scrapper's reinforced stall in tidy little disasters. He prices everything like a favor, watches every shadow, and keeps the best contraband under the counter.

actions.name: tech
actions.condition_unmet_message: Modified sensors, cracked encryption keys, and a few things you don't even recognize.

actions.name: weapons
actions.condition_unmet_message: Old mining pistols and modified stun-batons. Scrapper's specialty.

actions.name: datapad
actions.condition_unmet_message: Encrypted and password-protected. Scrapper keeps his business to himself.

title: The Hidden Stash
description: The back corner is dark, damp, and just boring enough to be useful. Under a heap of industrial netting, a rebel cache buzzes softly behind a security field meant to make scanners look elsewhere.

actions.name: rebel cache
actions.already_open_message: The rebel cache is empty except for old names scratched into the lid.

actions.name: security field
actions.condition_unmet_message: A basic damping field to hide the contents from corporate scanners.

title: Recyc Bar
description: Dented glasses, sticky counters, and recyc-whiskey give the bar its proud chemical bite. A broken jukebox fights the ventilation with a synth-country tune nobody admits they like.

actions.name: glasses
actions.condition_unmet_message: Cloudy and chipped. The recyc-whiskey probably does most of the cleaning.

actions.name: jukebox
actions.condition_unmet_message: It skips every few beats, making the singer sound like they're hiccuping.

title: Card Den
description: A holo-card table flickers in the haze, one of several card games dealing bad odds with cheerful colors. Miners bet tiny stacks of scrip and pretend the next hand could change anything.

actions.name: card games
actions.condition_unmet_message: A high-stakes match of 'Miner's Fortune'. Best to stay out of it unless you have scrip to burn.

actions.name: table
actions.condition_unmet_message: Heavy and solid, built to withstand the occasional bar brawl.

title: Cold Locker
description: A reinforced locker squats in the rock with an amber scanner and a nasty little hum. The door feels cold from three steps away, like whatever is inside is drinking the room's heat.

actions.name: locker
actions.condition_unmet_message: You can hear something clicking inside. It's heavily protected.

actions.name: scanner
actions.condition_unmet_message: It doesn't recognize your ID. No surprise there.

title: Upper Gantry
description: The gantry overlooks Trade Row's bright, noisy clutter from railings slick with condensation. From up here, the whole market looks like a carnival built out of unpaid invoices.

actions.name: railings
actions.condition_unmet_message: They're loose and groan when you lean on them. Don't fall.

title: Pump Passage
description: Past the market noise, industrial pumps thump in a rhythm you feel through your boots. Oily drops fall from a rusted overhead pipe, marking the floor like a trail for people who should turn back.

actions.name: pumps
actions.condition_unmet_message: They move waste away from the hub. The vibration is constant and deep.

actions.name: pipe
actions.condition_unmet_message: The liquid is slick and smells like old engine oil.

title: Shift Queue
description: A low corridor funnels miners toward the checkpoint one badge at a time. White lights bleach the color out of every suit, leaving only scuffed boots, tired faces, and the beep of the scanner.

actions.name: lights
actions.condition_unmet_message: Industrial floodlights. They make the dust in the air look like solid walls.

actions.name: suit
actions.condition_unmet_message: Standard issue 'Iron-Skin' rig. It's heavy, hot, and smells of your own sweat.

title: Search Bay
description: Scanning arches hum at a pitch that makes your teeth itch. The reinforced counter is polished clean, but the shock-baton marks on the floor tell the older story.

actions.name: arches
actions.condition_unmet_message: Dominion biometric scanners. They're looking for contraband and 'unauthorized biological anomalies'.

actions.name: counter
actions.condition_unmet_message: Scratched and dented, built to withstand the weight of a hundred mining rigs a day.

title: Zeke's Booth
description: Zeke's window sits behind reinforced glass, half buried in badge readers and liability screens. The speaker crackles before he says anything, like even the booth is nervous.

actions.name: window
actions.condition_unmet_message: Smudged with fingerprints and covered in corporate status icons.

actions.name: speaker
actions.condition_unmet_message: A cheap, buzzing intercom. It's the only way to talk to the clerks.

title: Holding Cell
description: A temporary cage waits beside the checkpoint for anyone Dominion needs to sort later. Graffiti and scratched names cover the wall behind a bolted metal bench, stubborn proof that people were here.

actions.name: graffiti
actions.condition_unmet_message: Names and dates scratched into the paint. A history of people the system forgot.

actions.name: bench
actions.condition_unmet_message: Uncomfortable by design. Dominion doesn't want anyone staying here for long.

title: Blast Door A
description: Blast Door A fills the passage with scarred alloy, a locked console, and stubborn red lights. It does not look dramatic; it looks expensive, official, and perfectly happy to ruin your day.

north.message_locked: The blast door rejects your clearance. You need a valid Mine Access Badge.
north.message_unlock: The Mine Access Badge chirps. The blast door unlocks with a pressure hiss.

actions.name: blast door
actions.condition_unmet_message: Three meters of solid steel. You aren't getting through this without authorization.

actions.name: console
actions.condition_unmet_message: Access Denied. Liability score exceeds shift parameters.

title: Transit Tunnel
description: The tunnel beyond the checkpoint is too clean for the Homestead. A moving walkway hums under your boots, carrying you toward colder lights and people who call cruelty policy.

actions.name: walkway
actions.condition_unmet_message: A steady, mechanical pull that makes you feel even more like an object on a belt.

title: Concourse Lobby
description: The grand entrance is a massive, open space with floor-to-ceiling windows overlooking the mining pit. The air is filtered and perfectly chilled, and every badge reader seems to remember Nova was almost erased from the roster.

actions.name: windows
actions.condition_unmet_message: The mining pit is a sea of orange lights and grinding steel, miles below. Somewhere down there, the system has already found a worse use for you.

title: Observation Deck
description: Glass railings offer a dizzying view of the machines below. A row of holographic kiosks display productivity graphs that look more like warnings than statistics.

actions.name: railings
actions.condition_unmet_message: Reinforced glass. It's the only thing between you and a very long fall.

actions.name: kiosks
actions.condition_unmet_message: They're comparing current output to the 'Optimal Asset Model'. You aren't meeting the curve.

title: Customer Service
description: A row of identical glass booths where the colony's bureaucracy processes the living and the dead. The silence is broken only by the soft chime of verified badges.

actions.name: booths
actions.condition_unmet_message: Each booth is a small island of corporate authority.

actions.name: badges
actions.condition_unmet_message: The sound of shift-clearance is the only music this sector knows.

title: Foreman's Office
description: Boggs' local HQ is filled with humming server racks and stacks of physical shipment logs. A large map of the colony is projected onto the wall, glowing with Dominion blue.

actions.name: server racks
actions.condition_unmet_message: They store the data for every ounce of ore moved in this sector.

actions.name: map
actions.condition_unmet_message: It shows the colony as a series of interconnected veins, with the heart at the Logistics Sector.

title: Information Kiosk
description: A sleek terminal displaying Dominion propaganda and shift schedules in a constant loop. The screen reflects your face, overlaying it with a list of corporate 'Contribution' targets.

actions.name: terminal
actions.condition_unmet_message: A high-end interface, much better than the ones in the Homestead.

actions.name: screen
actions.condition_unmet_message: You look tired. The corporate overlay says you're '94% Efficient'.

title: Staff Lounge
description: The room is filled with ergonomic chairs and a synthetic plant that looks almost real. A coffee dispenser hums in the corner, offering 'Dominion Select' for verified staff only.

actions.name: chairs
actions.condition_unmet_message: They look incredibly comfortable. Too comfortable for a miner.

actions.name: plant
actions.condition_unmet_message: Plastic leaves and a scent-diffuser that smells of pine and chemicals.

actions.name: dispenser
actions.condition_unmet_message: The coffee smells like a real bean was once involved in its production.

title: Elevator Lobby
description: The entry to the Deep Mine lift is marked by heavy warning signs and a biometric scanner. Boggs' authorization sits in the system like a dare, and the lift cables groan beneath the floor.

north.message_locked: The retinal scanner flashes red: Access Denied. The lift controls won't unlock until Foreman Boggs authorizes your deep mine descent.
north.message_unlock: The retinal scanner chirps green. Foreman Boggs' authorization and Zeke's temporary override agree just long enough for the lift to unlock.

actions.name: warning signs
actions.condition_unmet_message: 'NO UNAUTHORIZED DESCENT. BIOLOGICAL HAZARD DETECTED.'

actions.name: scanner
actions.condition_unmet_message: A retinal scanner. It does not care whether Boggs is sending you to work or to disappear.

actions.name: cables
actions.condition_unmet_message: Thick, grease-covered bundles of braided steel.

title: Security Post
description: A room full of flickering monitors and weapon racks that smell of gun oil. A deactivated security drone hangs from a charging dock, its lens tracking your movement.

actions.name: monitors
actions.condition_unmet_message: They show camera feeds from every hallway in the sector.

actions.name: racks
actions.condition_unmet_message: Empty racks for stun-batons and riot shields. The guards must be on patrol.

title: Air-Lock Entrance
description: The airlock hisses as it cycles, releasing a blast of sub-zero air. The inner door is a solid block of frosted alloy that looks like it was carved from an ice shelf.

actions.name: door
actions.condition_unmet_message: Heavy and reinforced. It keeps the cold in and the contaminants out.

title: Aisle 01
description: Miles of blue server racks hang in the void, humming with the data of the colony's every transaction. The floor is a metal grate that reveals a bottomless pit of cabling below.

actions.name: server racks
actions.condition_unmet_message: Blinking lights and the soft whir of thousands of data-disks.

actions.name: grate
actions.condition_unmet_message: Industrial-strength mesh. You can see the glow of power-conduits far below.

title: Cooling Unit B
description: Massive fans pull freezing air through the stacks with a roar that drowns out all other sound. A layer of frost coats the walls, shimmering in the pale light of the server LEDs.

actions.name: fans
actions.condition_unmet_message: They're moving fast enough to create a small gale in the hallway.

actions.name: frost
actions.condition_unmet_message: Beautiful cymatic patterns formed by the extreme cold.

title: The Core Hub
description: The primary mainframe terminal glows with sterile blue light. A frozen console sits below it, its keys filmed with condensation and old fingerprints.

description_variants.description: The mainframe terminal has gone carefully blank, hiding the stolen access route under ordinary Dominion silence. The console is thawed now, its last rebel command burned into a cracked circuit board.
The frozen console has thawed just enough for input, and the mainframe terminal waits with the rebel spoof queued beneath Dominion compliance layers.
A dead rebel login flickers beneath the mainframe terminal while the frozen console drops inputs through stiff, ice-slick keys.

actions.name: terminal
actions.condition_unmet_message: A high-security interface. The rebel spoof is buried under Dominion compliance layers.

actions.name: console
actions.condition_unmet_message: The buttons are frozen stiff. You'll need to be careful with the input.

title: Backup Storage
description: Redundant data drives are stored in heavy, insulated cases that look like small safes. A portable heater in the corner has been kicked over, its coils long since cold.

actions.name: cases
actions.condition_unmet_message: Shielded against electromagnetic interference. The colony's insurance policy.

actions.name: heater
actions.condition_unmet_message: Someone was trying to stay warm down here. They didn't succeed.

title: Admin Office
description: A small, windowless room where the air is slightly warmer. A forgotten datapad lies on a desk next to a cup of coffee that has frozen solid into a brown puck.

actions.name: datapad
actions.condition_unmet_message: A personal device. It's displaying a half-finished letter home.

title: Crawlspace 4
description: A narrow passage behind the racks where the air is thick with the scent of hot electronics. A bundle of cables has been pulled loose, exposing a shimmering copper core.

actions.name: cables
actions.condition_unmet_message: A mess of power and data lines. Someone has been tampering with the connections.

actions.name: core
actions.condition_unmet_message: Pure, high-voltage energy. Don't touch it with your bare hands.

title: Elevator Landing
description: The base of the industrial lift opens into raw rock, red safety beacons, and a pressure that makes the ceiling feel closer than it is. The override got Nova down here; it does not promise a way back.

actions.name: lift
actions.condition_unmet_message: The only way back up. Boggs can pretend it is a work assignment because the lock agrees with him.

actions.name: beacons
actions.condition_unmet_message: Flickering amber lights warning of the hazards deeper in the sector.

actions.name: machinery
actions.condition_unmet_message: Massive drills and ore-crushers, currently silent during the shift-change.

title: Main Tunnel Alpha
description: The start of the deep excavation tunnels where the walls are scarred by giant drills. The official route markers blink toward Sector 4, but the hum underneath them feels older than the mine.

actions.name: drills
actions.condition_unmet_message: Colossal diamond-tipped bits, designed to chew through the canyon's hardest rock.

actions.name: ore cart
actions.condition_unmet_message: Empty and forgotten. A relic of a sector that ran dry years ago.

title: Side Shunt 4
description: A dead-end tunnel used for storage, filled with empty crates and broken support beams. A discarded datapad lies in the dust, its screen cracked but still flickering with a final message.

actions.name: crates
actions.condition_unmet_message: Smashed open and looted for anything valuable.

actions.name: support beams
actions.condition_unmet_message: Rusted steel girders, barely holding up the ceiling.

actions.name: datapad
actions.condition_unmet_message: The log of a miner who didn't make it out. 'The noise... it's coming from the walls.'

title: Cavern Junction
description: A cavernous hub where the tunnels branch out like the veins of a beast. A central support pillar blinks 'Equipment Failure,' but the rhythm beneath the alarm feels deliberate.

actions.name: support pillar
actions.condition_unmet_message: The heart of the sector's structural integrity. If Nova brings the lights back, she also gives the thing under them a clearer path to sing.

title: Conveyor Belt
description: A massive conveyor belt stretches into the darkness, its rubber surface stained with ore dust. Heavy tread marks circle the motor housing and disappear into the adjoining tunnels.

actions.name: conveyor belt
actions.condition_unmet_message: A never-ending loop of industrial rubber.

actions.name: motor
actions.condition_unmet_message: Overheated and leaking oil. It's a miracle it's still running.

title: Riot Control Post
description: A fortified sentry post with reinforced walls and high-intensity floodlights aimed inward. Dominion did not build this to keep monsters out; it built it to keep workers moving.

actions.name: sentry post
actions.condition_unmet_message: A Dominion outpost designed to keep the workers in line.

actions.name: floodlights
actions.condition_unmet_message: Blindingly bright, designed to disorient anyone attempting a breach.

actions.name: shield
actions.condition_unmet_message: A 'Bulwark' class riot shield. It's almost as tall as you are.

title: Ore Sifter
description: Loud, vibrating machinery sorts rock from ore with a deafening roar. A cloud of fine dust hangs in the air, catching the light of the overhead safety strobes.

actions.name: machinery
actions.condition_unmet_message: Industrial sifters designed to catch even the smallest traces of Stellarium.

actions.name: dust
actions.condition_unmet_message: The air is thick enough to chew. Your suit's filter is working overtime.

actions.name: strobes
actions.condition_unmet_message: Flickering emergency lights, painting the room in staccato orange.

title: Toxic Pocket
description: Corrosive fumes fill the air, turning the lights into blurred, orange smears. A cracked pipe hisses with a yellow gas that tastes like copper and makes your eyes water.

actions.name: pipe
actions.condition_unmet_message: A gas-main that's been breached. The fumes are highly acidic.

title: Deep Shoring
description: Unstable metal support beams groan under the canyon walls above. Past the fresh collapse, the industrial noise thins until only the impossible hum remains.

actions.name: support beams
actions.condition_unmet_message: Twisted and buckling under immense pressure.

actions.name: debris
actions.condition_unmet_message: A fresh collapse. You'll have to climb over the sharp edges to proceed.

title: Ancient Threshold
description: The rock gives way to smooth, impossible geometry that does not belong in a mine. This is no longer punishment duty. This is something Dominion dug into and then lied about.

actions.name: geometry
actions.condition_unmet_message: Angles that shouldn't exist, formed from a single piece of unknown stone.

actions.name: walls
actions.condition_unmet_message: Vibrating with a deep, subsonic rhythm.

title: The Long Slope
description: A steep descent into the silent dark where the air gets unnaturally cold. A single Architect pillar stands at the bottom of the slope, glowing with a quiet white light.

actions.name: pillar
actions.condition_unmet_message: A monolithic structure covered in symbols that seem to dance when you aren't looking.

title: Echo Antechamber
description: A vast, silent room that tastes like ozone and old static. The ceiling is lost in shadow, and the floor is a single, seamless sheet of black stone pulling every alarm and quota behind Nova into irrelevance.

actions.name: ceiling
actions.condition_unmet_message: An infinite void above your head.

actions.name: stone
actions.condition_unmet_message: Smoother than any metal you've ever felt.

title: Geometric Gap
description: This is where the colony's industrial paint meets the ancient stone of the Architects. The transition line is surgically precise, and crossing it feels like stepping out of Dominion's story into something that was waiting first.

actions.name: stone
actions.condition_unmet_message: Perfectly smooth and vibrating with a low, resonant frequency.

actions.name: line
actions.condition_unmet_message: The rock has been atomized, leaving a seam so fine it's almost invisible.

title: Silent Walkway
description: An acoustically deadened corridor where your footsteps make no sound. The walls are covered in shimmering fractals that seem to move just out of the corner of your eye.

actions.name: walls
actions.condition_unmet_message: The patterns are complex enough to make your head ache if you stare too long.

actions.name: fractals
actions.condition_unmet_message: Light trapped in stone, shifting and pulsing in a rhythm you can almost hear.

title: The Heart
description: The tuning fork hums in the center of the room, held in a cradle of white geometry. The air here vibrates with a pressure that feels like a physical weight against your chest.

actions.name: tuning fork
actions.condition_unmet_message: The Relic. It's calling to you.

actions.name: geometry
actions.condition_unmet_message: Smooth white blocks that seem to grow directly out of the floor.

title: The Harmonic Well
description: A deep pit of resonant energy that glows with a screaming white light. A low-hanging mist swirls around the edge of the well, tasting like copper and lost memories.

actions.name: mist
actions.condition_unmet_message: It feels cool against your skin and carries the scent of a storm.

title: Memory Alcove
description: A small alcove where the past feels distant and blurred. The walls are covered in a fine layer of static that ripples when you move, as if the room is forgetting you.

actions.name: walls
actions.condition_unmet_message: The surface is warm and slightly fuzzy to the touch.

actions.name: static
actions.condition_unmet_message: Snow on a dead screen. It feels like your thoughts are being scattered.

title: Emergency Exit
description: A hidden door dissolves into mist as alarms bleed through the impossible quiet. Beyond it, a dark maintenance tunnel leads back into the colony that has finally noticed Nova.

actions.name: maintenance tunnel
actions.condition_unmet_message: Back into the grit. The sirens make it clear the mine is no longer a workplace; it is a trap closing around you.

title: Maintenance Access
description: A final, narrow crawl through the colony's gut, filled with humming conduits, hot pipes, and red strobes racing toward the cargo lift. Zeke's route is open by seconds, not permission.

description_variants.description: Red strobes race along the conduits toward the cargo lift while pipes hammer hard enough to sound like pursuit. Zeke's spoof is holding the gate open somewhere ahead, but the route feels like it is shrinking behind you.

actions.name: conduits
actions.condition_unmet_message: The conduits vibrate with lockdown power, every surge stealing light from somewhere behind you.

actions.name: pipes
actions.condition_unmet_message: The pipes clatter against their brackets hard enough to sound like boots in the walls.

actions.name: lift
actions.condition_unmet_message: The cargo lift shudders at the end of the route, half-open because Zeke is still lying to its gate.

title: Gantry Level 1
description: A vertical climb up rusted metal gantries that shake with every vibration of the mine. A row of fuel drums are stacked near the rail, their labels warning of 'High Volatility'.

actions.name: gantries
actions.condition_unmet_message: Rickety and unsafe. Dominion's maintenance budget has been diverted elsewhere.

actions.name: drums
actions.condition_unmet_message: Highly explosive. A single spark would take out the whole level.

title: Refueling Bay
description: The air is thick with the smell of high-grade propellant and industrial grease. A heavy refueling hose snaking across the floor, its nozzle leaking a shimmering, blue liquid.

actions.name: propellant
actions.condition_unmet_message: The scent is sharp and chemical, stinging your nostrils.

actions.name: hose
actions.condition_unmet_message: Thick and reinforced, built to handle the pressure of ship-grade fuel.

title: Cargo Lift
description: A heavy industrial platform bucks beside a manual override panel. The hydraulics scream under emergency power, and security shutters keep trying to bite the lift closed.

description_variants.description: The cargo lift bucks under emergency power, trapped between the override panel and a hostile lockdown. The hydraulics scream as security shutters try to close around the platform.

actions.name: override panel
actions.condition_unmet_message: The override panel is jammed in a forced-open state. If Zeke loses the spoof, the lift will seal itself.

actions.name: hydraulics
actions.condition_unmet_message: The hydraulics are failing under the strain of the lockdown, but they are still moving.

north.message_locked: A hostile Acoustic Bulwark blocks access to the security checkpoint.

title: Security Checkpoint B
description: A fortified checkpoint where the air smells of ozone and static. A Dominion dampener coordinates with a hovering security drone as floodlights sweep for any asset trying to become a person instead.

actions.name: checkpoint
actions.condition_unmet_message: Automated turrets and scanning arches. You're in corporate-only territory now.

actions.name: floodlights
actions.condition_unmet_message: Searching for any movement. You'll need to be fast.

north.message_locked: A Dominion Dampener and security drone lock down the route to the pods.

title: Pod Bay
description: The massive cargo rails stretch up toward the planetary shield, glowing with emergency red. A single cargo pod waits on the pad, ugly and barely alive. [npc:The Warden] blocks the hatch while [npc:Zeke] frantically lies to the controls.

actions.name: cargo rails
actions.condition_unmet_message: Magnetic launchers designed to shoot ore into orbit. Dominion built them for cargo, not escape.

actions.name: escape pod
actions.condition_unmet_message: A cargo pod with life-support bolted in like an afterthought. It looks less like rescue than a chance.

north.message_locked: The Warden stands in front of the escape pod, blocking the access hatch.
north.message_unlock: The Warden is defeated. Zeke has opened the pod hatch.

title: The Pod Core
description: Inside the cramped pod, the air is thick with the scent of recycled oxygen and panic. Zeke hammers at the navigation console, his hands shaking as the countdown blares from the overhead speaker.

actions.name: pod
actions.condition_unmet_message: The metal walls feel thin enough to poke a finger through.

actions.name: navigation console
actions.condition_unmet_message: The console is locked. It needs a physical Chime bypass to override the Dominion shield frequency.

actions.name: speaker
actions.condition_unmet_message: The countdown is deafening in the small space.

title: Launch Rail
description: The pod shoots up the magnetic rail, pinning you against the seat as the colony falls away. Outside the viewport, the shimmering planetary shield blooms like a hateful flower.

actions.name: rail
actions.condition_unmet_message: A blur of motion and magnetic discharge.

actions.name: viewport
actions.condition_unmet_message: The colony is just a dot now. The sky is real... and very dangerous.

actions.name: planetary shield
actions.condition_unmet_message: A cage made of light. It's solid enough to shred any ship without the right frequency.

title: Presence Stress Test
description: A debug-only staging floor packed with friendly contacts, loose supplies, and multiple hostile patrol groups for checking the exploration presence UI under pressure.

actions.name: debug manifest
actions.condition_unmet_message: This room exists only to inspect crowded exploration presence layout.

title: Enemy Party Size Test
description: Debug layout room for enemy party sizes.

actions.name: debug manifest
actions.condition_unmet_message: This room exists only to inspect one-, two-, and three-member enemy party layouts.

actions.name: Workbench
actions.condition_unmet_message: Jed's workbench is ready. Time to prove you remember which end of the soldering iron gets hot.

title: Congested Enemy Party Test
description: Debug layout room with five stationary enemy parties for congested placement checks.

actions.name: debug manifest
actions.condition_unmet_message: This room exists only to inspect five stationary enemy parties in a congested layout.

title: North Movement Test
description: Debug room for testing enemy parties entering and leaving from the north.

title: South Movement Test
description: Debug room for testing enemy parties entering and leaving from the south.

title: East Test Area
description: An empty adjacent room for testing enemy entry/exit animations.

title: Sewer Landing Pad
description: The Astra sits powered down, its hull reflecting the dim bioluminescent glow of sewer algae. The air is damp, smelling of ozone and ancient pipes.

actions.name: astra
actions.condition_unmet_message: The Astra's engines are silent. The resonance shield holds the ship trapped here.

title: Sewer Passage
description: A long, concrete run-off tunnel under the Spire. Water drips from rusted pipes overhead. Dark shapes move in the shadows ahead.

actions.name: vent pipes
actions.condition_unmet_message: Heavy steam pipes running up to the lower city.

title: Vent Output
description: Acid rain falls from a synthetic sky, steaming as it hits hot exhaust vents. You stand in a trash-filled alleyway between looming vertical blocks.

actions.name: trash pile
actions.condition_unmet_message: Wet cardboard, empty food cartons, and discarded tech parts.

title: The Static
description: A dark dive bar built inside a derelict subway car. Neon signs pulse erratically, casting a purple glow over the patrons.

actions.name: sign
actions.condition_unmet_message: The bar's neon sign. It buzzes loudly but is mostly dark.

title: Zeke's Apartment
description: Zeke's old apartment. The furniture is sparse, and the shelves are empty. A workstation hums on a table in the center of the room.

actions.name: workstation
actions.condition_unmet_message: A terminal displaying lines of data and Spire blueprints.

actions.name: planning table
actions.condition_unmet_message: A table in the center of the room. Ready for Heist planning.

title: Night Market
description: A lively, shoulder-to-shoulder market street. Colorful lanterns swing on wires overhead, and food stalls sizzle in the damp air.

actions.name: lanterns
actions.condition_unmet_message: String lights hung across the alley. Some are flickering out.

title: Transit Plaza
description: A wide square dominated by the base of the Great Elevator. Dominion guards patrol behind heavy barriers.

actions.name: elevator controls
actions.condition_unmet_message: The elevator controls require high-level Spire authorization.

title: Laundry Service
description: Concrete service corridors run beneath the Cloud District, packed with steam pipes, laundry chutes, cleaning bots, and the only honest noise in the Upper City.

actions.name: sensor console
actions.condition_unmet_message: A service console tied into the penthouse scanner grid.

actions.name: service chute
actions.condition_unmet_message: A narrow laundry chute marked for priority penthouse delivery.

title: Skypark Dome
description: A rooftop garden under a force-field dome. The sun is fake, the trees are perfect clones, and every smile looks practiced.

actions.name: guest registry
actions.condition_unmet_message: A velvet-rope kiosk where the city decides who belongs.

title: Exec Lounge
description: A bar floats on a grav-platform above a silent atrium. VIP booths glitter with privacy glass and quiet blackmail.

actions.name: private safe
actions.condition_unmet_message: A private executive safe hidden behind a decorative gravity-well sculpture.

actions.name: concierge terminal
actions.condition_unmet_message: A silent concierge terminal offering premium equipment with premium contempt.

title: Archive Vault
description: Crystal shards rise in endless indexed stacks over a glass floor that looks down two hundred stories. The Lens hangs in a containment field, humming like a held note.

actions.name: light puzzle
actions.condition_unmet_message: A prism array waits for Orion to tune its acoustic frequencies.

actions.name: lens relic
actions.condition_unmet_message: The Lens floats inside a containment field.

actions.name: prototype rack
actions.condition_unmet_message: A dangerous experimental weapon rack waits beside a drone testing alcove.

enemy_flavor.corporate_assassin: A corporate assassin flickers between shard stacks, waiting for the alarm to justify murder.

title: Landing Pad Roof
description: The Spire roof shudders under violent wind. The Astra waits on the pad while the Planetary Shield rotates overhead in impossible chords.

actions.name: launch astra
actions.condition_unmet_message: The Astra can slip the Shield only after the Administrator is down.

enemy_flavor.administrator_boss: The Administrator descends in a polished security frame, its voice still gentle while the roof guns arm.

title: Obsidian Shelf
description: The Astra cools on a shelf of black volcanic glass above a river of magma. Heat shields glow cherry-red while ash falls like dirty snow.

actions.name: astra
actions.condition_unmet_message: The Astra ticks and cools on the landing gantry.

actions.name: compliance bulletin
actions.condition_unmet_message: The factory PA hisses through layers of heat distortion.

title: Slag River
description: Broken stepping stones cross a flowing lava channel. Source flares erupt from pressure cracks without warning, bending the heat into bright, violent chords.

actions.name: slag crossing
actions.condition_unmet_message: The crossing teaches respect fast: watch the flare rhythm or burn.

actions.name: ammo crate alpha
actions.condition_unmet_message: A Dominion ammo crate is chained to a basalt pylon.

enemy_flavor.magma_drone: A heat-shielded drone skims low over the slag, pushing you toward bad footing.

title: Cooling Springs
description: A hidden maintenance pocket where condensed steam collects in clear hot pools. The factory noise drops to a distant pulse, giving the crew room to breathe.

actions.name: steam pool
actions.condition_unmet_message: A rare quiet pocket in the Foundry heat.

actions.name: worker tablet
actions.condition_unmet_message: A cracked tablet pings weakly from beside a maintenance pool.

title: Waste Intake
description: Massive pistons slam raw scrap into furnace mouths. Compactor chains drag wrecked mechs through ash and sparks toward the factory interior.

actions.name: cooling vent controls
actions.condition_unmet_message: Vent controls cycle scalding air through the service airlock.

actions.name: project phantom terminal
actions.condition_unmet_message: A classified terminal waits behind cracked thermal glass.

actions.name: ammo crate beta
actions.condition_unmet_message: A crate of shaped charges sits too close to the intake pistons.

actions.name: scrap mech pile
actions.condition_unmet_message: Three destroyed mechs lie half-melted in the lava-flow debris.

enemy_flavor.slag_golem: A slag golem drags itself out of the intake channel, armor still molten at the seams.

title: Service Airlock
description: A heavy pressurized door separates volcanic exterior from sterile factory interior. Decon lights sweep the chamber in hard white bands.

actions.name: airlock door
actions.condition_unmet_message: The airlock will not cycle until the cooling vents are under control.

actions.name: ammo crate gamma
actions.condition_unmet_message: A final ammo crate is stacked beside the decon pumps.

title: Conveyor Belt
description: Conveyor belts carry half-assembled droids under hammering presses. Some bins are stamped BIOLOGICAL COMPONENTS in language too clean for what it means.

actions.name: belt timing console
actions.condition_unmet_message: The belts move in brutal industrial rhythm.

actions.name: rejected droid
actions.condition_unmet_message: A rejected droid twitches beside a bin of defective units.

enemy_flavor.phantom_prototype: A proto-Gh0st unit blinks into view with an energy blade already raised.

title: Conditioning Chamber
description: Sterile white tiles are stained with oil. Rows of empty chairs with restraints face a wall of Spectral ID calibration screens.

actions.name: conditioning records
actions.condition_unmet_message: Production records list Phantom units as batches, not people.

title: The Forge
description: A massive hammer falls over a relic mount. The Anvil hums beneath the impact rhythm, shaping raw ore like the factory is teaching metal to obey.

actions.name: fabrication matrix
actions.condition_unmet_message: The fabrication matrix feeds the conveyor floor with Phantom shells.

actions.name: conveyor puzzle
actions.condition_unmet_message: The Anvil mount is locked behind moving belt plates and timed crushers.

actions.name: anvil relic
actions.condition_unmet_message: The Anvil waits in the hammer cradle, hot enough to glow without flame.

actions.name: test chamber terminal
actions.condition_unmet_message: An overclocked trial program offers rewards with no concern for survival.

title: Power Core
description: The Deep-Core Engine pulses in the center of the factory, feeding heat and psionic current into a cradle mount built for something far larger than a ship.

actions.name: engine mount
actions.condition_unmet_message: The Deep-Core Engine is locked under thermal clamps.

actions.name: phase-cutter arrays
actions.condition_unmet_message: A rack of ship-scale Phase-Cutter Arrays is wired to the engine cradle.

title: Titan Dock
description: A circular platform hangs over the volcano primary vent. Catwalks tremble above orange depth while a Titan Walker waits in its launch cradle.

actions.name: commander rylos
actions.condition_unmet_message: Rylos waits on the Titan Walker, chrome face lit by the volcano.

actions.name: escape launch
actions.condition_unmet_message: The Astra can launch once the engine and arrays are aboard.

enemy_flavor.titan_walker_boss: Rylos brings the Titan Walker down like a judgment made of missiles and steel.

title: Executive Dock
description: The Astra hangs beneath the Ring while Compliance fighters rake the hull. Beyond the airlock, a red carpet floats over bright-white flooring and the bodies of Thorne loyalists drift in dead gravity pockets.

actions.name: docking controls
actions.condition_unmet_message: Compliance has the Astra in a tractor lock.

actions.name: airlock console
actions.condition_unmet_message: Three hull breach warnings pulse across the pressure map.

enemy_flavor.orbital_fighter: Compliance interceptors pivot around the Ring with machine-perfect formation.

title: Grand Concourse
description: Golden Architect statues tower over an immaculate promenade. Every wall repeats Vale's compliance notices between advertisements for Harmony.

actions.name: director logs
actions.condition_unmet_message: A private archive waits behind the Director's biometric lock.

title: Solarium
description: Real soil, tropical trees, and a pale strip of sand sit beneath a fusion lamp. The fruit is rotting in a paradise built for executives.

actions.name: fake beach
actions.condition_unmet_message: The artificial sun warms sand inside a station-sized cage.

title: Security Hub
description: A fortified checkpoint seals the lift to the core. Compliance officers move without conversation while Null-G drones cling to the ceiling.

title: Service Shaft
description: Gravity ends at the hatch. Cables descend through a vertical dark while Hunter-Killer droids scrape along distant walls, too armored to fight head-on.

actions.name: zero-g cables
actions.condition_unmet_message: The drop requires careful movement between patrol sweeps.

title: Server Farm
description: Server columns vanish into cold mist. Architect notation bleeds through the Dominion interface, and someone is breathing inside the cooling vents.

actions.name: mainframe terminal
actions.condition_unmet_message: The terminal carries both Harmony and Architect root directories.

actions.name: server maze
actions.condition_unmet_message: Cold aisles repeat around the same impossible rack numbers.

actions.name: firewall node alpha
actions.condition_unmet_message: The first firewall node shifts its cipher every few seconds.

actions.name: firewall node beta
actions.condition_unmet_message: The second node is protected by a recursive Dominion lock.

actions.name: firewall node gamma
actions.condition_unmet_message: The final node projects a hard-light guardian into the aisle.

actions.name: purged backup rack
actions.condition_unmet_message: A server marked PURGED still carries a faint diagnostic pulse.

actions.name: dead sysadmin
actions.condition_unmet_message: A station administrator floats behind a coolant pipe, keycard still clipped to the uniform.

title: Anchor Chamber
description: A tank of conductive fluid hangs inside a cathedral of cables. Elara floats at its center, wired into the Ring as a living processor while the Anchor relic turns beside her.

actions.name: anchor relic
actions.condition_unmet_message: The Anchor remains locked to Elara's failing firewall.

enemy_flavor.hk_droid: The Hunter-Killer repairs every wound before it finishes opening. Only Stasis can stop its pursuit.

title: Throne Room
description: A glass observation deck looks down on the planet and its failing Shield. Thorne's containment field faces a command dais where Vale waits without blinking.

actions.name: containment field
actions.condition_unmet_message: Thorne is trapped behind the field while Vale watches the Anchor.

actions.name: executive armory
actions.condition_unmet_message: The executive armory requires a station administrator's keycard.

title: The Tear
description: The Ring breaks into slow impossible angles around a wound in reality. Music exists here without air, speakers, or permission.

actions.name: reality breach
actions.condition_unmet_message: The Compliance Avatar still anchors Vale's control of the breach.

enemy_flavor.compliance_avatar: Vale's security intelligence condenses into a towering hard-light execution protocol.

title: The Campfire
description: The Crash Site fire burns again, rebuilt from blue waveforms on an island of memory. Beyond it, every world fractures across the same impossible sky.

actions.name: song-fire
actions.condition_unmet_message: The blue fire waits for every missing voice to return.

title: Infinite Cubicle
description: Identical desks stretch beyond sight beneath fluorescent panels. The same performance review repeats while a manager assembled from office hardware leans over every partition.

actions.name: employee file
actions.condition_unmet_message: Zeke's employee record refreshes every time someone tries to close it.

enemy_flavor.manager_projection: The Manager weaponizes every fear that usefulness is the price of belonging.

title: Endless War
description: A corridor repeats under muzzle flashes without guns. Every target wears a Spectral ID, and Gh0st's kill-suite supplies the order before anyone speaks.

actions.name: pure audio log
actions.condition_unmet_message: One clean recording of Elara survives beneath the kill-suite noise.

enemy_flavor.endless_war_echo: The loop gives every memory a weapon and every weapon Gh0st's hands.

title: Silent Shore
description: A black ocean lies perfectly still beneath an empty sky. Every Aethel note dies at the waterline before Orion can hear an answer.

enemy_flavor.silent_shore_wraith: Silence wears the outline of the last survivor and insists there is nobody left to answer.

title: Echo of the Mines
description: Jed's workshop, the mine checkpoint, and the first shelter occupy the same impossible room. Manager projections patrol routes drawn from Nova's oldest fear.

actions.name: manager patrol
actions.condition_unmet_message: The projections reset the memory whenever they see Nova.

actions.name: jed echo
actions.condition_unmet_message: Jed's workbench remains exactly where memory left it.

title: The Elevator
description: The mine elevator doors open onto white noise instead of a shaft. Its floor remembers every departure Nova could not stop.

title: Memory Bridge
description: A platform of static extends over the raw Source. Each honest memory spoken aloud becomes another section of bridge.

actions.name: unfinished bridge
actions.condition_unmet_message: The static needs memories the Source cannot counterfeit.

actions.name: campfire promise
actions.condition_unmet_message: The crew has one quiet moment before the final ascent.

actions.name: singularity threshold
actions.condition_unmet_message: The path forward exists only when the whole circuit is ready.

title: Memory Stair
description: Jed's workshop door opens into jungle canopy, Spire glass, Foundry catwalk, and Ring metal arranged as an ascending spiral.

actions.name: aethel grave
actions.condition_unmet_message: Names written in resonance drift beneath the stair.

title: Spire of Thought
description: A spiral arena assembles itself from the Warden's checkpoint, jungle ruins, Spire glass, Foundry steel, and Ring servers. Every discarded memory has learned how to fight.

actions.name: future astra hull
actions.condition_unmet_message: A scorched section of the Astra protrudes from a future that has not happened.

enemy_flavor.memory_leak: The leak pulses with Jed, Thorne, and Elara in the same unfinished frame.
enemy_flavor.nightmare_guard: The guard changes faces every time Nova recognizes someone she could not save.

title: The Center
description: A single platform rests on an infinite white ocean. There is no floor beneath it, only the collective decision to stand.

actions.name: tuning focus
actions.condition_unmet_message: Vale's code still blocks the Source. The Key cannot tune the world until both forms fall.

enemy_flavor.ascended_vale: Vale stands peacefully at the center of the universe, offering extinction as relief.
enemy_flavor.ascended_god: The human outline breaks. A blinding geometry rises from the white ocean and calls itself silence.

title: New World
description: Morning reaches the Colony without a Shield overhead. At Zeke's diner, a community board holds a beach photograph and the memories Nova can no longer access alone.

actions.name: beach photograph
actions.condition_unmet_message: The photograph remembers Tideglass Beach for everyone in it.

title: Crash Site
description: The escape pod wreckage is half-submerged in warm glow-water. The cracked pod core ticks under a scorched access panel while thick vines hang from concrete struts. Zeke sits coughing on the hull as a low, resonant hum rolls through the air.

actions.name: wreckage
actions.condition_unmet_message: The pod's thrusters are completely fused. It won't fly again.

actions.name: pod core
actions.condition_unmet_message: Examining the pod's sub-critical core...

actions.name: glow-water
actions.condition_unmet_message: The water is warm and vibrates with a gentle frequency. It feels soothing to touch.

actions.name: Scan moss
actions.condition_unmet_message: The moss on the hull vibrates under your scanner.

title: Escape Pod Interior
description: The cramped interior of the escape pod is scorched and smells of melted plastic. Sparks shower from the console frame, and a dented emergency storage locker hangs open.

actions.name: locker
actions.condition_unmet_message: A basic emergency kit contains field dressings and mineral water.

title: Scorched Brush
description: Shattered vines and charred branches litter the muddy clearing where the pod plowed through. The thick purple leaves are still warm to the touch, venting thin plumes of gray steam.

actions.name: charred starleaf
actions.condition_unmet_message: Beneath the scorched canopy, starleaf shoots glow blue where Source-rich water reaches them.

title: Overgrown Glade
description: A dense grove of giant broadleaf ferns arches overhead, filtering the dim sky into a green haze. Bioluminescent mushrooms grow in thick clumps along a decaying log.

actions.name: luminous mushrooms
actions.condition_unmet_message: The mushrooms pulse in a slow rhythm. Their caps are edible once the toxic silver gills are removed.

title: Stream Bank
description: A narrow bank where the swamp mud gives way to smooth pebbles. A gentle current of glowing blue water runs eastward, gurgling softly as it cuts through the roots.

actions.name: glow-water current
actions.condition_unmet_message: The current carries warm notes through the roots, like the Ocean breathing under the swamp.

title: Security Perimeter
description: A smashed Dominion surveillance drone lies wedged between two stone blocks. Its primary scanner lens is shattered, but a small backup light still flashes a slow warning code.

actions.name: drone
actions.condition_unmet_message: The chassis is crushed, but its recording cells hum faintly.

title: Pod Fragment
description: A metal cargo panel from the escape pod has sheared off and sits wedged in the mud. Underneath it, several empty battery cells and a bundle of diagnostic wires lie scattered.

actions.name: Salvage conduits
actions.condition_unmet_message: Salvaging power conduits from the pod wreckage...

title: Mist Pools
description: Deep wetlands where the glowing water pools into wide, still basins. Mineral-rich fog clings to the surface of the water, making the patrolling Echo-Borer look like a floating shadow.

actions.name: reed bulbs
actions.condition_unmet_message: You cut away two resonant reed bulbs before their defensive spores can open.

title: Resonant Sedge
description: Thick marshes filled with glowing reeds. The wind passing through the reeds creates a low, musical whisper that seems to rise directly from the damp soil.

actions.name: spore warning
actions.condition_unmet_message: Amber sacs inflate along the path. Aethel markers identify the cloud as neurotoxic and harmful to Erosion control.

title: Crystalline Flats
description: A wide, sandy delta where the stream spreads thin. The crystalline sand catch the blue light of the water, shimmering and vibrating with a faint hum when stepped on.

actions.name: half-sunken causeway
actions.condition_unmet_message: Carved stones under the mud form an Aethel causeway aimed toward the Sanctuary Facility.

title: Resonant Falls
description: The stream cascades over three massive Architect stone pillars. The falling water strikes the resonant stone, ringing out a quiet, rhythmic chord that echoes off the cliff face.

actions.name: sheltered cookfire
